articles.title: War with Iran is "not over," Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says
articles.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the war with Iran is "not over" because there's still highly enriched uranium that needs to be removed from the country.

articles.title: Trump, Xi Slated for Beijing Summit Amid Iran Conflict
articles.description: President Donald Trump is scheduled to meet Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing this week as the US focuses on the war in Iran. The summit is also expected to cover trade frameworks for Boeing aircraft, soybeans, and AI semiconductors. Bloomberg’s Stephen Engle reports on what is at stake in the meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: How Gout Gout stacks up against Usain Bolt in 200 meters
articles.description: Correspondent Jon Wertheim breaks down the data behind 18-year-old Australian phenomenon Gout Gout's U20 world record 200-meter sprint, comparing it to Usain Bolt's standing 2009 world record, and what his coach said it will take to win Olympic gold.

articles.title: How the fastest teen ever in the 200m got his start on the track
articles.description: After seeing Gout Gout run, Di Sheppard knew he was the real deal and wanted to coach him. In the years since, the teen has broken world records.

articles.title: Meet Gout Gout, the Australian sprinter drawing comparisons to Usain Bolt
articles.description: Australian sprinter Gout Gout is breaking records, including one set by Usain Bolt. Track coach Di Sheppard first saw Gout run at age 12 and predicted: "I'm going to make that one a champion."

articles.title: Louisiana's governor defends decision to suspend congressional primaries
articles.description: After the Supreme Court ruled a Louisiana congressional map unconstitutional, Gov. Jeff Landry suspended primaries, the state is redrawing its map, and some Black voters fear losing their voice in D.C.

articles.title: Samsung's Bespoke update is big step towards a useful AI for your fridge
articles.description: Running a software upgrade on a fridge feels strange, but these are the times we live in.

articles.title: India, UAE working on pact to help in evacuation of Indians via Fujairah port
articles.description: India and UAE are finalizing an agreement to facilitate the evacuation of Indian workers via Fujairah port, a move likely to be signed during PM Modi's upcoming stopover. This pact addresses potential disruptions from the West Asia conflict, offering a crucial maritime route for over 4 million Indian workers in the UAE.

articles.title: Rickie Fowler ties for second at the Truist Championship and the comeback talk returns

articles.title: Americans on hantavirus cruise ship head to Nebraska

articles.title: Himanta to take oath as Assam CM today after governor’s appointment

Following his unanimous election as leader of the BJP-led NDA legislature party, Sarma staked his claim with support from 102 MLAs. He will be sworn in on May 12, with Prime Minister Modi expected to attend.

articles.title: Kolkata flips, BJP leads in 102 of 144 civic wards
articles.description: BJP's strong performance in Kolkata's assembly elections, leading in 102 of 144 KMC wards, has sparked speculation about advancing municipal polls. This surge contrasts with Trinamool's previous dominance, as evidenced by the 2024 Lok Sabha results showing BJP gaining significant ground in the city's wards.

articles.title: Almost half of adults worldwide eat out at least once a week—exacerbating the obesity epidemic
articles.description: New research presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026, Istanbul, Turkey, 12–15 May) suggests that no matter where people live, eating out instead of preparing meals at home is linked to weight gain and obesity.

articles.title: Pooled analysis reveals semaglutide shows good efficacy in older adults aged over 65 years
articles.description: A new analysis of the STEP trials carried out by semaglutide manufacturer Novo Nordisk has analyzed various trials to show the safety and efficacy of the obesity drug semaglutide in older adults (over 65 years), and found similar efficacy and safety as in the general trial populations. The study is by Prof Luca Busetto from the University of Padova in Italy and colleagues, including those from Novo Nordisk.

articles.title: New post-hoc analysis examined daily oral orforglipron in adults over 65 with obesity, with or without diabetes
articles.description: A new analysis presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026, Istanbul, Turkey, 12–15 May) examined daily oral orforglipron treatment for the treatment of obesity, with or without diabetes, in users aged 65 years and over, with results and a safety profile similar to that seen in the ATTAIN clinical trial program population.

articles.title: Could the 'Ozempic Era' shift blame for obesity from individuals to the food industry?
articles.description: An essay presented at the European Congress on Obesity in Istanbul, Turkey (12–15 May) suggests that a new age of obesity drugs could shift the blame for living with obesity from individuals to the food industry—just as smoking has been blamed on the tobacco industry and, to a lesser extent, alcohol consumption on the alcohol industry.

articles.title: Body mass index: It's not all that it's hyped up to be
articles.description: Body mass index (BMI) is a simple mathematical formula widely used to quickly gauge someone's health. BMI = weight (kg) divided by height squared (m2). Its simplicity and cost-effectiveness makes BMI a popular health tool, but it's based on some problematic logic.

articles.title: Study shows that a 1% reduction in annual working hours is associated with a 0.16% decrease in obesity rates
articles.description: A new study presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026) in Istanbul, Turkey (12–15 May) shows that a 1% reduction in annual working hours is associated with a 0.16% decrease in obesity rates across OECD countries. The study was led by Dr. Pradeepa Korale-Gedara, University of Queensland, Brisbane, Australia, and colleagues.

articles.title: Body of missing US soldier recovered off coast of Morocco
articles.description:
1st Lt Kendrick Lamont Key Jr was participating in largest military exercise among US, Nato allies and African nations
A search team recovered the body of a US soldier who went missing near a cliff during a training exercise in Cap Draa, Morocco, the US Army said on Sunday.
Moroccan searchers found the remains on Saturday in the water within a mile (1.6km) of where the soldier went missing on 2 May, the army said in a statement.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: The Bastl Kalimba is a wild synth that thinks it’s a thumb piano
articles.description:
It’s already raised over $700,000 on Kickstarter. | Image: Bastl	

Make no mistake, the Bastl Kalimba is a synthesizer, you just play it like a kalimba. Its tines don't really make much sound. There is an internal mic that you can blend in for a little acoustic spice, but it's mostly driven by the synth engine that combines physical modeling and FM. The tines are actually touch and velocity-sensitive triggers. And, while it can sound somewhat like a real kalimba, it's a lot more sonically versatile and offers features you can only find on a synth.
Beyond the synth sounds that range from pluck to pads, there are also built-in effects covering basic spatial effects like delay and reverb, as well as distortio …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Ashnymph’s Childhood EP is exhilarating dance goth rock
articles.description:
I can’t wait for a proper full length. | Image: Blitzcat Records	

I've got to thank my oldest friend and concert buddy, Tim, for turning me on to this one. Ashnymph is a London band that blends post-punk melodies with Krautrock rhythms and industrial grime. Their debut EP, Childhood, drifts between dreamy vocals buried in layers of reverb and four-on-the-floor dancefloor pounding. It's a thrilling opening salvo from a band that feels on the cusp of a major breakthrough.
Childhood opens with an ambient recording of someone walking down a hall (I think), and some swirling synth noise before the first song, "Island in the Sky" kicks off properly with a motorik beat and bass throb. The thin, digitally manipul …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Cricut’s $99 craft cutting machine helped me feel creative again
articles.description:
The desk-friendly Cricut Joy 2 comes in multiple colors. | Photo: Sheena Vasani / The Verge	

I've always been skeptical of products that claim to help you lead a more creative life. But one recently won me over. I've spent three weeks with the Cricut Joy 2, a smart cutting and drawing machine that made it easy for me to get back into making stickers, cards, bookmarks, and more.
The small $99 gadget isn't perfect, but its capabilities and app-provided templates were just what I was looking for. Caregiving, self-criticism, and mental health struggles have made it tough to tinker and doodle like I used to, and yet the Joy 2 clicked with me. It doles out quick wins when you're in the mood to create.
I've been testing the Cricut Joy 2  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Writers are fleeing the Substack Tax
articles.description:
Substack, the once buzzy newsletter platform, is losing a new swath of writers to rival platforms most people haven't heard of. Just last month, The Ankler, one of Substack's most popular publications, left for a platform that gives it more control over its site. Others who have departed Substack within the past year voiced similar complaints and cite the platform's increased focus on social features as well as a pricing model that puts a chokehold on their business.
Substack faced talent drain in 2024 linked to its platforming of Nazi newsletters, but now it's not just the platform's stance on hate speech that's driving away creators.
Sea …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: War with Iran is "not over," Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says
articles.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the war with Iran is "not over" because there's still highly enriched uranium that needs to be removed from the country.

articles.title: Trump, Xi Slated for Beijing Summit Amid Iran Conflict
articles.description: President Donald Trump is scheduled to meet Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing this week as the US focuses on the war in Iran. The summit is also expected to cover trade frameworks for Boeing aircraft, soybeans, and AI semiconductors. Bloomberg’s Stephen Engle reports on what is at stake in the meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: How Gout Gout stacks up against Usain Bolt in 200 meters
articles.description: Correspondent Jon Wertheim breaks down the data behind 18-year-old Australian phenomenon Gout Gout's U20 world record 200-meter sprint, comparing it to Usain Bolt's standing 2009 world record, and what his coach said it will take to win Olympic gold.

articles.title: How the fastest teen ever in the 200m got his start on the track
articles.description: After seeing Gout Gout run, Di Sheppard knew he was the real deal and wanted to coach him. In the years since, the teen has broken world records.

articles.title: Netanyahu wants Israel "to draw down to zero the American financial support"
articles.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu addresses the conflicts in Iran and Lebanon, the prospects for a peace deal, and the relationship between the U.S. and Israel.

articles.title: Meet Gout Gout, the Australian sprinter drawing comparisons to Usain Bolt
articles.description: Australian sprinter Gout Gout is breaking records, including one set by Usain Bolt. Track coach Di Sheppard first saw Gout run at age 12 and predicted: "I'm going to make that one a champion."

articles.title: Louisiana's governor defends decision to suspend congressional primaries
articles.description: After the Supreme Court ruled a Louisiana congressional map unconstitutional, Gov. Jeff Landry suspended primaries, the state is redrawing its map, and some Black voters fear losing their voice in D.C.

articles.title: Samsung's Bespoke update is big step towards a useful AI for your fridge
articles.description: Running a software upgrade on a fridge feels strange, but these are the times we live in.

topStories.title: Congress’ wait to join the Tamil Nadu Cabinet continues
topStories.description: Party sources said the Congress asked the TVK to accommodate Melur MLA P. Viswanathan and Congress Legislature Party leader S. Rajeshkumar in the Cabinet

topStories.title: ‘The Price Is Right’ contestant wins biggest single-game payout in show’s 54-year history
topStories.description: "The Price is Right" contestant Vanesa McCaskell won the largest single pricing game prize in the show's 54-year history during a Mother's Day episode.

topStories.title: Florida State-Georgia series cancellation is ominous sign for future of college football
topStories.description: Georgia and Florida State cancel their 2027-2028 home-and-home series amid new conference scheduling mandates and expanded college football playoff.

topStories.title: Gold Falls as Trump Rejection of Iran Offer Fans Inflation Fears
topStories.description: Gold fell as President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest peace offer to end the 10-week conflict choking the Strait of Hormuz, fanning inflation fears as weekend clashes in the Middle East threatened a fragile ceasefire.

topStories.title: Rickie Fowler ties for second at the Truist Championship and the comeback talk returns
topStories.description: Rickie Fowler posted a T-2 finish at the Truist Championship, his third consecutive top-10, fueling questions about whether he is back to being on the top players in the world.

dailyNews.title: Americans on hantavirus cruise ship head to Nebraska
dailyNews.description: The Americans evacuated from the deadly hantavirus cruise ship are on their way to the Nebraska Medical Center’s state of the art National Quarantine Unit. It is unclear how many of the Americans, who are all asymptomatic, will end up staying there and for how long. NBC News’ Camila Bernal has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Charlotte Hornets star LaMelo Ball’s baby name reveal turns out to be the disaster you’d expect
dailyNews.description: LaMelo Ball and Ana Montana reveal their newborn son's name is LaOne, adding to the Ball family's tradition of names that serve as branding vehicles.

dailyNews.title: Trump rejects Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal
dailyNews.description: Iran delivered its response to Pakistani mediators on Sunday, according to the state-run Islamic Republic News Agency.

dailyNews.title: Victoria's Secret model Candice Swanepoel strips down to just swimsuit bottoms in sultry new clip
dailyNews.description: Supermodel Candice Swanepoel posted a topless Instagram video wearing only Tropic of C bikini bottoms while playing Etta James' "At Last" on a table.

dailyNews.title: Almost half of adults worldwide eat out at least once a week—exacerbating the obesity epidemic
dailyNews.description: New research presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026, Istanbul, Turkey, 12–15 May) suggests that no matter where people live, eating out instead of preparing meals at home is linked to weight gain and obesity.

dailyNews.title: New post-hoc analysis examined daily oral orforglipron in adults over 65 with obesity, with or without diabetes
dailyNews.description: A new analysis presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026, Istanbul, Turkey, 12–15 May) examined daily oral orforglipron treatment for the treatment of obesity, with or without diabetes, in users aged 65 years and over, with results and a safety profile similar to that seen in the ATTAIN clinical trial program population.

dailyNews.title: Could the 'Ozempic Era' shift blame for obesity from individuals to the food industry?
dailyNews.description: An essay presented at the European Congress on Obesity in Istanbul, Turkey (12–15 May) suggests that a new age of obesity drugs could shift the blame for living with obesity from individuals to the food industry—just as smoking has been blamed on the tobacco industry and, to a lesser extent, alcohol consumption on the alcohol industry.

dailyNews.title: US Stock Futures Slip as US-Iran Deal Hope Fades: Markets Wrap
dailyNews.description: US equity futures declined while the dollar rose against most major peers in early trading after President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s response to his latest proposal to end the war, likely prolonging the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Hantavirus live updates: Americans aboard MV Hondius depart from Spain
dailyNews.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, has made its way to the Canary Islands, where passengers are disembarking.

dailyNews.title: China’s undersea cable threat raises $10T fears as Trump-Xi talks loom
dailyNews.description: Former intelligence official warns China and Russia can inflict devastating economic chaos by targeting undersea cables carrying 99% of global data.

dailyNews.title: Oil Jumps After Trump Says Iran’s Peace Offer ‘Unacceptable’
dailyNews.description: Oil surged after US President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest response to his proposal to end the war in the Middle East, prolonging the effective closure of the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Study shows that a 1% reduction in annual working hours is associated with a 0.16% decrease in obesity rates
dailyNews.description: A new study presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026) in Istanbul, Turkey (12–15 May) shows that a 1% reduction in annual working hours is associated with a 0.16% decrease in obesity rates across OECD countries. The study was led by Dr. Pradeepa Korale-Gedara, University of Queensland, Brisbane, Australia, and colleagues.

topStories.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
topStories.description: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

topStories.title: Iran live updates: Trump calls Iran's latest response 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE'
topStories.description: The U.S. conducted "self-defense" strikes against Iranian targets after Iran fired at U.S. destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, according to CENTCOM.

topStories.title: Trump rejects latest Iran response to US war proposal as totally unacceptable
topStories.description: Trump rejects latest Iran response to US war proposal as totally unacceptable

topStories.title: Trump rejects Iran response to US proposal, calls it ‘totally unacceptable’
topStories.description: Iranian state media reported earlier Sunday that Tehran had submitted its response to the latest US proposal through Pakistani mediators, though officials did not disclose details of the message.

topStories.title: Trump says he wants to open Fort Knox and personally check America’s $700 billion gold reserve
topStories.description: “We wanted to go and knock on the door of Fort Knox — a very thick door — and to see whether or not we have any gold in there,” Trump said.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Is Considering Pausing the Federal Gas Tax to Lower Prices, Energy Secretary Says
dailyNews.description: The tax is a little over 18 cents a gallon for gasoline. With the average national price above $4.50, the measure will provide little relief.

dailyNews.title: Trump giving diplomacy ‘every chance’ before more strikes on Iran, says Mike Waltz
dailyNews.description: The comments came after Trump said the ceasefire with Iran had not been broken despite both sides exchanging fire around the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump accuses Iran of ‘playing games’ with US for decades, says ‘they will be laughing no longer’
dailyNews.description: Trump accused Iran of deceiving the United States for decades and claimed Tehran had repeatedly delayed negotiations while benefiting from past US policies.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says US Could Hit 'Every Target' In Iran In 2 Weeks
dailyNews.description: The comments come as Iran is reported to have responded to the latest US proposal on ending a conflict that began on February 28 with US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Iran’s response to U.S. peace proposal ‘totally unacceptable’
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s response to a U.S. proposal to bring an end to the war in the Middle East, calling the message “totally unacceptable” on Truth Social.“I have just read the response from Iran’s so-called ‘Representatives,’” Trump posted Sunday afternoon.

dailyNews.title: Energy Sec. Wright says 'we're open to all ideas' amid calls to suspend gas tax: Full interview
dailyNews.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright tells Meet the Press that the Trump administration’s priority is ending Iran’s nuclear program and restoring secure shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, while ongoing tensions could keep gas prices elevated in the short term.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US helped secure release of 5 prisoners in Belarus deal, thanks Lukashenko
dailyNews.description: President Trump says five Polish and Moldovan prisoners have been released from detention in Belarus and Russia through U.S. diplomatic efforts.

dailyNews.title: Vance or Rubio? Trump Muses on Successor as the ‘Kids’ Fill Bigger Roles.
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio are boosting their profiles, generating speculation about who’s lining up for the 2028 presidential nomination.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran's response to peace proposal "totally unacceptable"
dailyNews.description: President Trump did not provide further details on what issues he had with the response or what would come next.

dailyNews.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
dailyNews.description: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  UFC champion 'very blessed' to fight at the White House
dailyNews.description: Undefeated lightweight champion Ilia Tuporia says UFC Freedom 250 will be the "biggest event in sports history."

dailyNews.title: Trump administration targets 12 foreign-born Americans for denaturalization
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is seeking to revoke the citizenship of 12 foreign-born Americans who officials say committed crimes that qualify them for denaturalization.
